scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install ci-cd-pipeline-builder\\n  or /plugin install ci-cd-pipeline-builder@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
